name: Vegetable Curry 1
recipeIngredient: 1 cup tomatoes (drained and crushed by hand or spoon)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook onion over medium-high heat in a non-stick pan until translucent.
2. Add mustard seeds and stir until they pop.
3. Add the remaining spices (cumin, garlic, ginger, curry powder, Cayenne) and cook for 1-2 minutes.
4. Stir in cauliflower, tomatoes, and water. Reduce heat, cover, and simmer until cauliflower is tender.
5. Add peas and season with salt to taste.
6. Serve with basmati rice. (This dish can be adapted with various spice combinations and amounts.)
